summary: Completed testing of AI Calibration In-App Notifications for Admins. All 6 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed NotificationBell, NotificationsPage, violet Sparkles icon, 'Отвори калибрация' button, and navigation to /ai-calibration.

issues: Minor: Console warning about div inside p tag in AICalibrationPage (hydration issue)

critical_code_review_comments: Notification anti-duplicate logic correctly uses unique key: 'cal_ready|{type}|{subtype}|{city}|{small_qty}'
Admin/Owner role filter correctly applied in check_and_notify_calibration_ready
Notification resolved properly (is_read=True, data.resolved=True) when approve called
Bulgarian language properly implemented in notification title and message
seed_data_creation: Created test calibration events with unique category identifiers (TEST_NOTIF_*, TEST_REVOKE_*, Сухо строителство/Гипсокартон_*) to test notification creation, anti-duplicate logic, and resolve behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Calibration Notifications feature fully tested. Backend: check_and_notify_calibration_ready() in ai_calibration.py creates notifications when category reaches 10 samples. Anti-duplicate uses calibration_key field. Notifications resolved when POST /api/ai-calibration/approve is called. Frontend: NotificationBell.js shows badge, NotificationsPage.js renders ai_calibration_ready type with violet Sparkles icon and 'Отвори калибрация' button navigating to /ai-calibration.

notification_created_at_threshold.notes: Notification created when category reaches MIN_SAMPLES_FOR_CALIBRATION (10) samples

anti_duplicate_logic.notes: No duplicate notification created for same category/city/small_qty combination

notification_resolved_on_approve.notes: Notification marked is_read=True and data.resolved=True when calibration approved

notification_only_admin_owner.notes: Admin user receives calibration notifications (role filter correctly applied)

notification_type_and_content.notes: type='ai_calibration_ready', Bulgarian title/message with category info and 'малко количество' for small_qty

new_notification_after_revoke.notes: After revoking calibration and adding more samples, new unresolved notification is created

frontend_notification_bell.notes: NotificationBell with data-testid='notification-bell' shows unread badge

frontend_notifications_page.notes: NotificationsPage loads with violet Sparkles icon for ai_calibration_ready notifications

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIS - Real notification system with MongoDB notifications collection
mocked_apis.details: All tests use real API endpoints and database operations
